title: Public functions in loadng/ missing return type annotations
description:
Three public methods in `src/lichen/loadng/` are missing return type annotations:

**loadng/discovery.py:**
- Line 78: `Discovery.originate_rreq()` - returns `RREQ`
- Line 95: `Discovery.process_rreq()` - returns `RreqResult`
- Line 142: `Discovery.process_rrep()` - returns `RrepResult`

**loadng/cache.py:**
- Line 64: `RouteCache.lookup()` - returns `RouteEntry | None`

**loadng/error.py:**
- Line 47: `ErrorHandler.record_flow()` - returns `None`
- Line 59: `ErrorHandler.process_rerr()` - returns `RerrAction | None`
